prompt: Find the reusable composable for displaying a compact dashboard metric with a label and value.
Which composable is the dashboard feature entry point and accepts a user name plus unread count?
Find the composable that presents dashboard metrics in a simple vertical layout.
Find the composable that applies the visual system used by the demo screens.
Find the app root composable that wires the theme to the dashboard route.
Find the preview composable for the metric card in the design-system preview group.
Find the reusable empty state panel with optional action label and click handler for recovery.
Find the design-system composable for a compact health status indicator with success warning and critical tones.
Find the preview composable that uses the custom design-system multi-preview annotation for status pills.
Find the dashboard composable that renders selectable filters as chips and reports the selected filter callback.
Find the dashboard composable that arranges metrics into a configurable number of columns.
Find the app composable for the free flavor variant badge with a default Free label.
Find the app composable for the paid flavor variant badge with a default Paid label.
